options.content:
# Cost Breakdown

This dashboard provides time series and breakdowns of AWS estimated charges. Configure the `Athena` datasource variable below to point to your Athena datasource UID (billing export). For simpler views, you can also use Cost Explorer queries.

targets.query: SELECT date_trunc('day', from_iso8601_timestamp(line_item_usage_start_date)) AS dt, SUM(line_item_unblended_cost) AS cost FROM ${billing_database}.${billing_table} WHERE from_iso8601_timestamp(line_item_usage_start_date) >= date_add('day', -30, current_date) GROUP BY date_trunc('day', from_iso8601_timestamp(line_item_usage_start_date)) ORDER BY dt

options.content:
### Athena example queries (billing export)

Replace `${billing_database}` and `${billing_table}` with your Athena database/table.

Top services by cost (last 30 days):

```
SELECT product_product_name AS service, SUM(line_item_unblended_cost) AS cost
FROM ${billing_database}.${billing_table}
WHERE from_iso8601_timestamp(line_item_usage_start_date) >= date_add('day', -30, current_date)
GROUP BY product_product_name
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 20;
```

Cost by linked account and tag (example):
```
SELECT line_item_account_id AS account, COALESCE(tags['${tag_key}'], '<<none>>') AS tag_value, SUM(line_item_unblended_cost) AS cost
FROM ${billing_database}.${billing_table}
WHERE from_iso8601_timestamp(line_item_usage_start_date) >= date_add('day', -30, current_date)
GROUP BY line_item_account_id, COALESCE(tags['${tag_key}'], '<<none>>')
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

Notes: Athena table schema depends on how the Cost & Usage Report is configured; `tags` may be a map column or separate columns (adjust query accordingly).

### AWS Cost Explorer CLI examples

Get monthly cost by service for a date range:

```
aws ce get-cost-and-usage --time-period Start=2026-06-01,End=2026-07-01 \\
  --granularity MONTHLY --metrics UnblendedCost \\
  --group-by Type=DIMENSION,Key=SERVICE
```

Get cost by tag (Key=Project):
```
aws ce get-cost-and-usage --time-period Start=2026-06-01,End=2026-07-01 \\
  --granularity MONTHLY --metrics UnblendedCost \\
  --group-by Type=TAG,Key=Project
```

For detailed historical exports, enable Cost & Usage Report to S3 and query with Athena as shown in the Athena examples.

list.description: Currency for EstimatedCharges metric (CloudWatch uses Currency dimension)
list.label: Currency
list.name: currency

list.description: Grafana Athena datasource UID for billing export queries
list.label: Athena Datasource
list.name: athena_datasource

list.description: Athena database containing the billing export (set to your Athena DB)
list.label: Billing Database
list.name: billing_database

list.description: Athena table name for the Cost and Usage Report export
list.label: Billing Table
list.name: billing_table

list.description: Billing tag key to group costs by (example: user:team)
list.label: Tag Key
list.name: tag_key
